TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Ciku = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Hwareynsu ka alang Ciku. 2,828 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 6,794 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 58% niqan 3,939 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 42% niqan 2,855 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 37%, Bunun 4%, Tayal 3%, Paiwan 2%, Truku 8%, Puyuma 1%, Sakizaya 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pusu nniqan alang ťÉ®ŤźĹŚźćÁ®ĪŚéüśĄŹšłćŤ©≥ Nniqan alang Gasuc Breenux. Klegan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Snhiyun cungcyaw Joro ni Teyeyncucyaw. Pnaah alang
S.PHON: = ¶iku = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn ńßwa…ĺ…ônsu ka alaŇč ¶iku. *,*** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis **%, bunun *%, tajal *%, paiwan *%, t…ĺuku *%, pujuma *%, saki*aja *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. pusu nniqan alaŇč ******** nniqan alaŇč gasu ¶ b…ĺ…ô…ônux. kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč amis. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis ni tlu. snńßijun ¶uŇč ¶jaw …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ôn ¶u ¶jaw. pnaańß alaŇč
S.FORM: = Ciku = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Hwareynsu ka alang Ciku. 2,828 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 6,794 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 58% niqan 3,939 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 42% niqan 2,855 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 37%, Bunun 4%, Tayal 3%, Paiwan 2%, Truku 8%, Puyuma 1%, Sakizaya 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pusu nniqan alang ťÉ®ŤźĹŚźćÁ®ĪŚéüśĄŹšłćŤ©≥ Nniqan alang Gasuc Breenux. Klegan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Snhiyun cungcyaw Joro ni Teyeyncucyaw. Pnaah alang
S.PHON: = ¶iku = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn ńßwa…ĺ…ônsu ka alaŇč ¶iku. *,*** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis **%, bunun *%, tajal *%, paiwan *%, t…ĺuku *%, pujuma *%, saki*aja *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. pusu nniqan alaŇč ******** nniqan alaŇč gasu ¶ b…ĺ…ô…ônux. kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč amis. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis ni tlu. snńßijun ¶uŇč ¶jaw …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ôn ¶u ¶jaw. pnaańß alaŇč
